hooks.prompt: The user is about to run a Bash command. Check if it starts a local dev server (npm run dev, npm start, next dev, etc). If so, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Never start local dev servers. Test via Vercel deployment."}. Also evaluate risk using the severity rubric (1-5). If severity >= 4, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "High risk operation: <description>. Requires confirmation."}. Otherwise {"ok": true}.

Before finishing, check: (1) Are there failing tests? (2) Are there uncommitted changes? If either is true, respond with {"ok": false, "reason": "Mention any failing tests and ask if the user wants to commit uncommitted changes."}. Otherwise, respond with {"ok": true}.
